summary: Completed testing of Admin system with domain-based access control (@gotoretreats.com). All features working correctly. Fixed a bug: added missing isAdmin field in /api/auth/login response.
passed_tests: Admin user (admin@gotoretreats.com) has isAdmin: true in auth response
GET /api/admin/stats returns platform metrics for admin users (21 users, 21 profiles, 67 views, 20 clicks)
GET /api/admin/users returns user list for admin users
GET /api/admin/feedback returns suggestions with source field for admin users
Non-admin users get 403 Access denied for /api/admin/stats
Non-admin users get 403 Access denied for /api/admin/users
Non-admin users get 403 Access denied for /api/admin/feedback
Unauthenticated requests get 401 Unauthorized for all admin APIs
Admin dashboard /admin page accessible for admin users
Admin dashboard shows Overview tab with 6 stat cards (Users, Profiles, New Users 7d, Views, Clicks, Suggestions)
Admin dashboard shows Users tab with searchable user list table
Admin dashboard shows Suggestions tab with filter (All, Dashboard, Pricing Page)
Non-admin users redirected to homepage when accessing /admin directly
Admin link visible in navbar dropdown ONLY for admin users (user.isAdmin === true)
Non-admin users do NOT see Admin link in navbar dropdown
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing admin user (admin@gotoretreats.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin system fully tested and working. Domain-based access control checks @gotoretreats.com email suffix via isAdminEmail() in lib/auth.ts. Fixed bug: added isAdmin field to /api/auth/login response (was missing). Admin dashboard has 3 tabs: Overview (stats), Users (searchable list), Suggestions (filterable list with Pricing/Dashboard badges). All admin API routes protected server-side via validateSession() + isAdminEmail() checks.

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing isAdmin field in login response - frontend needed this to conditionally show Admin link in navbar dropdown
bugs_fixed.fix: Added import for isAdminEmail function and added isAdmin: isAdminEmail(user.email) to the user object in response

rca_of_the_issue: The /api/auth/login endpoint was missing the isAdmin field in its response. This caused the Navbar component to not show the Admin link for admin users because user.isAdmin was undefined. The /api/auth/me endpoint already had isAdmin, but login did not. Fixed by importing isAdminEmail from lib/auth.ts and adding isAdmin: isAdminEmail(user.email) to the response.
